case_title: LASALLE BANK NA AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU VS. STEPHANIE BLOUNT et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LASALLE BANK NA AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES SERIES 2007-HY05 TRUST ITS  SUCCESSORS AND OF ASSINGS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLOUNT, STEPHANIE DOES 1 THROUGH X, INCLUSIVE VIDAL, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201 VELASCO AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
